title: VEditWindow Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub VEditWindow (Sequence As String, Object As String, Parent As Form)
parameters:
Sequence	String expression
		 containing the name of a vision sequence in the current project.

Object	String expression
		 containing the name of a vision object in the current project.
description: Displays the editor for search window don't care pixels.  For more details, see the EditWindow Property in the Vision Guide Properties reference.
